import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        a0, a1, a2 = a[0], a[1], a[2]
        if a0 + a1 != 0:
            b[0] = -a2
            b[1] = -a2
            b[2] = a0 + a1
        elif a1 + a2 != 0:
            b[0] = a1 + a2
            b[1] = -a0
            b[2] = -a0
        else:
            # a0=-a1, a2=-a1 => a0=a2
            b[0] = -a1
            b[1] = a0 + a2
            b[2] = -a1
        start = 3
    
    # pair remaining
    i = start
    while i < n:
        b[i] = a[i+1]
        b[i+1] = -a[i]
        i += 2
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        i, j, k = 0, 1, 2
        if a[i] + a[j] != 0:
            b[k] = a[i] + a[j]
            b[i] = -a[k]
            b[j] = -a[k]
        elif a[j] + a[k] != 0:
            b[i] = a[j] + a[k]
            b[j] = -a[i]
            b[k] = -a[i]
        else:
            # a[i]+a[k] != 0
            b[j] = a[i] + a[k]
            b[i] = -a[j]
            b[k] = -a[j]
        start = 3
    
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        j = i + 1
        b[i] = a[j]
        b[j] = -a[i]
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

            b[2] = -y

        b[i+1] = -a[i]
        i += 2
    
    print(*b)

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        i0, i1, i2 = 0, 1, 2
        if a[i1] + a[i2] != 0:
            b[i0] = a[i1] + a[i2]
            b[i1] = -a[i0]
            b[i2] = -a[i0]
        elif a[i0] + a[i1] != 0:
            b[i0] = a[i2]
            b[i1] = a[i2]
            b[i2] = -(a[i0] + a[i1])
        else:
            # a[0]+a[2] = -2*a[1] != 0
            b[i0] = a[i1]
            b[i1] = -(a[i0] + a[i2])
            b[i2] = a[i1]
        start = 3
    
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        b[i] = a[i+1]
        b[i+1] = -a[i]
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        a0, a1, a2 = a[0], a[1], a[2]
        if a0 + a1 != 0:
            b[0] = -a2
            b[1] = -a2
            b[2] = a0 + a1
        elif a1 + a2 != 0:
            b[0] = a1 + a2
            b[1] = -a0
            b[2] = -a0
        else:
            # a0=-a1, a2=-a1 => a0=a2
            b[0] = -a1
            b[1] = a0 + a2
            b[2] = -a1
        start = 3
    
    # pair remaining
    i = start
    while i < n:
        b[i] = a[i+1]
        b[i+1] = -a[i]
        i += 2
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        i, j, k = 0, 1, 2
        if a[i] + a[j] != 0:
            b[k] = a[i] + a[j]
            b[i] = -a[k]
            b[j] = -a[k]
        elif a[j] + a[k] != 0:
            b[i] = a[j] + a[k]
            b[j] = -a[i]
            b[k] = -a[i]
        else:
            # a[i]+a[k] != 0
            b[j] = a[i] + a[k]
            b[i] = -a[j]
            b[k] = -a[j]
        start = 3
    
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        j = i + 1
        b[i] = a[j]
        b[j] = -a[i]
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # handle first 3
        i0, i1, i2 = 0, 1, 2
        if a[i1] + a[i2] != 0:
            b[i0] = a[i1] + a[i2]
            b[i1] = -a[i0]
            b[i2] = -a[i0]
        elif a[i0] + a[i1] != 0:
            b[i0] = a[i2]
            b[i1] = a[i2]
            b[i2] = -(a[i0] + a[i1])
        else:
            # a[0]+a[2] = -2*a[1] != 0
            b[i0] = a[i1]
            b[i1] = -(a[i0] + a[i2])
            b[i2] = a[i1]
        start = 3
    
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        b[i] = a[i+1]
        b[i+1] = -a[i]
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
